query: What is the most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026, latest available as of late June 2026? Report the exact YTD acres and date.
answer:
I've completed the research. 

**The most recent NIFC National Fire News year-to-date acres burned figure for 2026 is 3,071,850 acres**, covering the period January 1 – June 28, 2026, as published on the NIFC page dated **June 29, 2026**. This accompanies a YTD count of **35,682 wildfires**. The figures were verified directly against the live NIFC page (confirmed current as of 2026-06-29), and they run well above the 10-year average (~+60% on acres, ~+33% on fire count).

sources.title: National Fire News | National Interagency Fire Center

key_facts: Data is from the NIFC National Fire News page dated June 29, 2026; YTD range labeled 1/1/26-6/28/26 (through June 28, 2026).
Page confirmed current as of 2026-06-29 via HTTP server date header (Mon, 29 Jun 2026 21:25:23 GMT).
2026 YTD acres (~3.07M) are roughly +60% above the 10-year YTD average (~1,922,572 acres).
2026 YTD fire count (35,682) is roughly +33% above the 10-year YTD average (~26,823 fires).
2026 is the second-highest YTD acreage through late June in the last 11 years, behind only 2022 (3,625,819 acres).
